title: Tool: add_episode (synchronous)
userStory: As the agent, I want an add_episode tool so that the chat can write new memory back to the brain in the same turn.
acceptanceCriteria: Handler POSTs to http://graphiti:8000/add_episode synchronously and returns the resulting episode id
No queue, no spool, no second store — the call blocks until Graphiti returns (typically 1–3s for extraction)
Tool registered with the chat endpoint
Verify: invoking add_episode in a chat turn returns within ~3s and the next search_brain call surfaces the new episode
